mainEntity.name: Workers comp for gig workers Uber injured Murray?
mainEntity.text: Workers comp for gig workers Uber injured Murray?

acceptedAnswer.text: Varies by platform; Utah classifies many as contractors—no auto comp. File unemployment or third-party.

suggestedAnswer.text: Murray gig economy gap: no standard comp. Check app insurance; lawyer pursues alternative claims like auto policy.
